name: Democrats.org
subject: We're working around the clock to hold Trump accountable
body:
We're counting on you to support this important work
---
**Help us keep holding Trump's feet to the fire. Pitch in to support our Trump War Room:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e31/4105524447/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-War-Room1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Earlier this week, we launched our official Trump War Room -- a massive undertaking to get out the facts about Donald Trump and his administration.

We've already been hard at work this week dealing with the revelations about Russia, reacting to his disgraceful business plan that looks like an instruction manual for bribery, and responding to the confirmation hearings for the least qualified and most conflict-ridden Cabinet in history.

And not to toot our own horn, but it's working. As we show more Americans who Trump and the GOP really are, Trump's approval rating plummets -- it's now down to an abysmally low 37% as even his supporters start to face facts.

This is important work -- but, to be perfectly honest, running and staffing a 24/7 operation like this isn't cheap.

So, can you pitch in $3 or more to help us hold Trump accountable? Our Trump War Room is already making a big difference, but we can't keep it running without you.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e3e/4105524447/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Trump-War-Room1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e3f/4105524447/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Trump-War-Room1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e3c/4105524447/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Trump-War-Room1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e3d/4105524447/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Trump-War-Room1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e3a/4105524447/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Trump-War-Room1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Trump-War-Room](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e3b/4105524447/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Trump-War-Room1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpsmydemocratsorgTrumpWarRoom&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd")**

** Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e38/4105524447/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784e39/4105524447/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784dc6/4105524447/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c034/4067b0a/231295c33/7e784dc7/4105524447/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170115_ew_nd&source=em_20170115_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

We've already been hard at work this week dealing with the revelations about Russia, reacting to his disgraceful business plan that looks like an instruction manual for bribery, and responding to the confirmation hearings for the least qualified and most conflict-ridden Cabinet in history. And not to toot our own horn, but it's working. name: Team Van Hollen
subject: see you in Bowie?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Are you joining us later today as we rally to save health care? **[Please click here to RSVP, if you haven't already.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b25/70cdc2ba/47469fdc/3979680/326768299/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+click+here+to+RSVP+if+you+havenrs&utm_campaign=em1517&source=em1517")**

_Begin Forwarded Message :_
> Friend, we wanted to send you a quick reminder that this Sunday, January 15th, is a NATIONAL Day of Action to save health care. We hope you will join the hundreds of people who have already signed-up to join us to demonstrate that we will fight tooth and nail to stop Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans from turning back the clock on progress we have made.
>
> More than 90% of all Americans now have health care and we don't want to see our country move backwards. Please join us at 2pm on Sunday in Bowie, Maryland to show your commitment to protecting the progress that has been made on health care!
>
> **[Join us on Sunday. Send in your RSVP here>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b25/70cdc2ba/47469fdc/3979681/326768299/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Join+us+on+Sunday+Send+in+your+RSVP+here&utm_campaign=em1517&source=em1517")** **WHEN:** Sunday, January 15th 2:00 PM
> **WHERE:** Bowie Student Center Ballroom. Bowie State University
> 14000 Jericho Park Road, Bowie MD 20715
> PARKING: Lot J-1 [**[MAP LINK]**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b25/70cdc2ba/47469fdc/397969e/326768299/VEsF/ "https://s.bsd.net/cvanhollen/main/page/-/MAP_CVH_Jan17.jpg?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+MAP+LINK&utm_campaign=em1517&source=em1517") [Yes, I'll be there](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b25/70cdc2ba/47469fdc/397969f/326768299/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Yes+Ill+be+there&utm_campaign=em1517&source=em1517") Republicans wants to repeal the Affordable Health Care Act and strip 30 million people of their health care without any plan to replace it. **[Please join us on Sunday and help show them Marylanders are committed to stopping this reckless scheme.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b25/70cdc2ba/47469fdc/397969c/326768299/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Please+join+us+on+Sunday+and+help+show+t&utm_campaign=em1517&source=em1517")**
>
> We hope to see you there.
>
> Team Van Hollen
>
>
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b25/70cdc2ba/47469fdc/397969d/326768299/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em1517&source=em1517")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b25/70cdc2ba/47469fdc/397969a/326768299/VEsB/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em1517&source=em1517") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: LIVE at 12:30 p.m. ET: Bernie Sanders
body:
# **Today at 12:30 p.m. ET, featuring Bernie Sanders:
[Tune in to the livestream of Bernie's rally to protect the Affordable Care Act.](https://ourrevolution.com/our-first-stand/ "https://ourrevolution.com/our-first-stand/")**
[](https://ourrevolution.com/our-first-stand/ "https://ourrevolution.com/our-first-stand/")
**[WATCH AT 12:30 pm ET»](https://ourrevolution.com/our-first-stand/ "https://ourrevolution.com/our-first-stand/")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: ❗ "Heartbeat bill" introduced in Congress >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c715f/24c69fd9/fc163497/18eea1d3/678384367/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all&source=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all")
---

Peter,

Rep. Steve King (R-IA) just introduced a bill that amounts to a total abortion ban.

It's a copycat of the "heartbeat bill" that recently passed in the Ohio legislature and the first of its kind introduced in Congress.

Congressional Republicans feel emboldened by the dangerous abortion legislation making its way through the states and they know they have Trump's support. That's a trend we need to stop immediately.

This community has stepped up every time congressional Republicans have introduced bills to limit women's ability to make their own health care decisions, and today, I'm counting on you again.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight abortion bans at every level of government.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c715f/24c69fd9/fc163497/18eea1cc/678384367/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170115_email_King6wk?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all&source=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all")**

This bill bans abortion if a heartbeat is detected in a fetus, which can be as early as six weeks -- and before many women even know they're pregnant. It also outlines jail time for any doctor who provides an abortion without checking for a heartbeat or proceeding if a heartbeat is detected.

The courts have struck down laws like this before to make it clear that such bans are unconstitutional.

But Republicans now feel like they have a shot at passing the most extreme anti-choice laws they can think of -- and they might.

That's why we have to send a crystal clear message that there are consequences for attacking women and the right to choose.

**Donate $3 to send a message to Steve King and any Republican who agrees with him that we will fight any bill that bans abortion:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Stop-Steve-King](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c715f/24c69fd9/fc163497/18eea1cd/678384367/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170115_email_King6wk?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStopSteveKing&utm_campaign=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all&source=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c715f/24c69fd9/fc163497/18eea1ce/678384367/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170115_email_King6wk?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all&source=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all")

|

1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c715f/24c69fd9/fc163497/18eea1c8/678384367/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all&source=WQEFE115N_digital_email_20170115_King6wk_n-all").
